creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 227859
py-django-netfields-1.2.3.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django-netfields to 1.2.3. I'd like to take maintainership as well.

Changes to the port:
- Add a workaround to prevent the installation of the testsuite into the top-level of Python's site-lib directory.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere -> OK (11.4-RELEASE amd64 for py36, py37, py38, py39 and py310)
- Runtime -> OK
